name: codex-skills
description: Codex workflow skills for harnessed execution, persistent runs, orchestration, resumable handoffs, and execution proof.

interface.shortDescription: Workflow skills for durable Codex work
interface.longDescription: A reusable Codex plugin that bundles workflow-oriented skills for harnessed engineering loops, persistent execution, orchestration, resumable handoffs, and file-backed execution proof.
defaultPrompt: Use the harness engineering skill to run a coding task through context intake, execution, verification, and recovery.
Use the bundled workflow skills to manage a long-running coding task.
Use the execution proof skill to leave behind verifiable proof of task completion.
Use the orchestration skill to structure a multi-step Codex workflow.
